summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly states this is not a dedupe cluster. Non-security PRs are kept open for independent maintainer review; security-shaped credential/auth-rate-limit items are routed to central security handling only.

actions.reason: Distinct open PR with no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical and insufficient merge/close proof in this inventory shard.
Distinct provider-compatibility PR with no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical and no allowed merge path in plan mode.
Credential and auth-token loading behavior is security-shaped and should be handled by central OpenClaw security review.
Distinct memory-core bugfix PR with no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical and insufficient close or merge basis.
Distinct gateway diagnostics PR with no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical and no allowed merge path in this plan.
Large distinct feature/bugfix PR requiring normal maintainer review; no close, merge, or replacement action is supported by the hydrated artifact.
The PR is credential-error and leaked-key adjacent, so it should be reviewed through central OpenClaw security handling before backlog automation acts on it.
Auth-rate-limit behavior with an attacker/flood scenario is security-sensitive and out of scope for PR inventory cleanup automation.
Distinct UI rendering bugfix PR with no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical and insufficient proof for closeout or merge recommendation.
Distinct docs/template PR; keep open for normal review because merge is blocked and bot review details/checks are incomplete in the artifact.
